name: CNX Resources Corp
business: CNX Resources Corporation is an independent natural gas company that develops and produces natural gas, NGLs, and condensate primarily from the Marcellus and Utica Shale formations in the Appalachian Basin, and also from coalbed methane properties. It sells natural gas to gas marketers, industrial customers, local distribution companies, and power generation facilities. The company also provides midstream gathering services and sells environmental attributes.

exposures.sentence: CNX Resources Corporation is a premier independent ultra-low carbon intensity natural gas development, production, midstream and technology company centered in the Appalachian Basin.

catalysts.event: 2026 capital expenditures expected between $556 million and $586 million
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, CNX expects capital expenditures to be between $556 million and $586 million.

catalysts.event: 2026 annual sales volumes expected to be approximately 605-620 Bcfe
catalysts.sentence: CNX expects 2026 annual sales volumes to be approximately 605 - 620 Bcfe.
